summary: Comprehensive testing of Stamp Settings UI polishing and Document Stamping PDF generation features completed successfully. All requested features verified: signature size controls (small/medium/large), inline color picker with preset colors, delete confirmation modal, full document stamping flow with branded stamps. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified with no horizontal scrolling issues on any page.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/stamp-templates - Returns list of templates with all fields
POST /api/stamp-templates - Creates templates with all 5 layout options (horizontal, vertical, compact, logo_left, logo_right)
POST /api/stamp-templates - Creates templates with signature settings (include_signature: true)
POST /api/stamp-templates - Creates templates with custom hex colors
POST /api/documents/upload - Uploads PDF and returns hash, pages
POST /api/documents/stamp - Creates branded stamp with layout, color, signature options
POST /api/documents/stamp - Works with all 5 layout options
GET /api/documents/stamps - Returns list of document stamps
frontend_ui_tests: Stamp Settings page loads correctly with no horizontal scrolling
My Templates tab shows template cards with color, size, opacity info
Create New tab shows inline color picker with 6 preset colors + custom picker + hex input
Signature size controls (small/M/large buttons) visible and functional
Delete confirmation modal appears when clicking delete on template
Delete confirmation modal has Cancel and Delete Template buttons
Modal closes correctly when Cancel is clicked
Document Stamping page loads with Quick Templates section
PDF upload works and shows preview
Generate Verified Stamp button creates stamp successfully
Success modal shows with QR code, stamp ID, download options
All 7 pages tested have no horizontal scrolling issues

signature_size_controls.details: Small/Medium/Large buttons visible next to 'Draw Your Signature' label. Clicking changes canvas size.

inline_color_picker.details: 6 preset color buttons (Emerald, Blue, Purple, Gold, Red, Teal) + native color picker + hex input field all inline

delete_confirmation_modal.details: ConfirmationModal component shows 'Delete Template?' title with Cancel and Delete Template buttons. Modal closes on Cancel.

document_stamping_flow.details: Full flow tested: Upload PDF → Fill details → Generate Verified Stamp → Success modal with QR code and download options

branded_stamp_generation.details: Backend generates branded stamps with proper layouts, colors, QR codes. Stamp ID format: TLS-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXXXX

seed_data_creation: Test templates created and cleaned up during testing. Existing templates: Standard Template, Affidavit Template, Contract Template.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Stamp Settings UI polishing features verified working: signature size controls, inline color picker, delete confirmation modal. Document stamping with branded PDF generation working correctly. No horizontal scrolling issues on any page. Payment integration (AzamPay) remains MOCKED.
